name: CANstressOnPending
title: CANstressOnPending
description: Registers a CAPL function as callback that is called if CANstress is switched into the state Pending.

parameters.name: Note The callback functions must correspond to the following syntax: long FunctionName( dword ); Should the CAPL function used as callback not longer be called when CANstress changes into the Pending condition, an empty string must be passed as parameter to CANstressOnPending. // delete or switch off present callback CANstressOnPending( " " );
